headline: All 5 N59 codegen gaps closed in current main + source-to-silicon NUMERIC-EQ PASS on RTX 5070. expected=512.5 got=512.5 abs_err=0 ulp_err=0.

context.device: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070 (ubu-2, sm_120a JIT from sm_80 PTX)

gaps_closed.name: while_cond_predicate_bank_mismatch
gaps_closed.fix: _nvptx_classify_local_for_stmt: extended predicate-bank rules to accept symbol-form ops (`<`, `<=`, `>`, `>=`, `==`, `!=`) alongside word forms. _nvptx_cmp_mnemonic + _nvptx_cmp_mnemonic_for_type also accept symbol forms.

gaps_closed.name: missing_stmt_load_on_accumulator_index
gaps_closed.fix: _nvptx_lower_stmt STMT_ASSIGN branch: added op=="index" arm that synthesizes mul.lo.s64 + add.s64 + ld.global.<ty> trio against a scratch %rd_idxa_<dst.id>. _nvptx_classify_locals Pass 2/3 declares the scratch reg and propagates the base operand to U64.

gaps_closed.name: missing_stmt_store_on_scalar_output
gaps_closed.fix: _nvptx_lower_stmt STMT_ASSIGN branch: added op=="index_set" arm that synthesizes mul.lo.s64 + add.s64 + st.global.<ty> trio against a shared %rd_idxs_addr scratch. Single shared addr because each store completes inline before the next.

gaps_closed.name: i64_var_local_misclassified_as_f64
gaps_closed.fix: _nvptx_classify_local_for_stmt: for STMT_ASSIGN, honor dst.type_id (1=i64->U64, 2=i32->U32, 4=f32->F32, 3=f64->F64 default). Plus Pass 1 operand-kind inference for STMT_BINOP/STMT_ASSIGN: when classifier-default is F64 and at least one operand classifies as U32/U64, inherit. Plus Pass 0 KERNEL param-Local kind via params[i].type_id.
gaps_closed.ptx_evidence: L13: .reg .u64 %rd4 (idx as U64); L30: mov.u64 %rd4, 0; L43: add.s64 %rd9, %rd4, 1; L44: mov.u64 %rd4, %rd9

gaps_closed.name: negative_local_id_leaks_into_emit_form
gaps_closed.fix: _nvptx_lower_stmt STMT_ASSIGN: early-return with honest stub `// RFC 071 P4+ - skipped STMT_ASSIGN with miss-local dst` when s.dst.id < 0, before the default mov mnemonic resolver. No `mov.f64 %fd-1` leak.

gaps_closed.name: honest_stub_pattern_generalised
gaps_closed.fix: Extended the `// unsupported binop: X` honest-stub discipline. STMT_ASSIGN miss-local sentinel + STMT_ASSIGN op-shape mismatches emit explicit `// RFC 071 P4+ - skipped/unsupported` markers.

additional_changes: _nvptx_binop_mnemonic_for_kind helper: integer-bank dst (U32/U64) emits add.s32/mul.lo.s32/add.s64/mul.lo.s64; FP banks fall through to existing _nvptx_binop_mnemonic (byte-eq for FP path).
_nvptx_ld_param_mnem_for_kind helper: kind-aware ld.param.<ty> for the KERNEL prologue.
_nvptx_elem_size_for_kind helper: byte width per RKIND for index-arithmetic.

KERNEL param ld.param prologue in _nvptx_lower_func: emits ld.param.<ty> %<reg>, [<kernel>_param_<i>] for each classified param Local at the entry block. Preserves byte-eq for fixtures whose params have type_id=0 + are unused as addresses (_test_partition's synthetic kernel_entry).

regression_verification.vec_mul_p4_fixture_re_emit: PASS (byte-equivalent shape to historical c29359ab + 097451f3 output)

honest_caveats.scope: All 5 gaps closed. Fix landed on top of current main (which lacked the c29359ab N35 synth + 830e44c0 N45 CSE that previously existed on an unmerged worktree). This effectively re-introduces those patterns + adds the N59-specific extensions (G1 symbol-form predicate, G4 type_id classifier, G5 sentinel skip, operand-kind inference for STMT_BINOP/ASSIGN, kind-aware ld.param prologue).
honest_caveats.no_CSE: The N45 CSE optimization (deduplicate to_i64 + addr-reg sharing) is NOT included in this cycle. vec_mul emits 3 redundant cvt.s64.s32 lines (one per a[gid]/b[gid]/c[gid]). This is correctness-clean but PTX is ~13% larger than the post-CSE form. CSE is a follow-on cycle on top of this commit.
honest_caveats.no_hir_to_mir_changes: Per task constraints, hir_to_mir.hexa (N68 lane) was NOT modified. All fixes live in compiler/codegen/nvptx_target.hexa.
honest_caveats.single_thread_reduction: This kernel is launched as 1×1×1 — multi-thread warp-reduce via shfl.sync.idx is a separate follow-on cycle. The closure here proves the non-element-wise kernel class (scalar accumulator + back-edge loop + scalar output) is reachable through the source-to-silicon pipeline.
